title: Business Operations & Team Support Manager
description:
Operations Manager / Right-Hand Support for Growing Service Business

Team Support | Operations | Communication | Implementation



We are looking for a highly capable, proactive, and dependable Operations Manager / Right-Hand Support person to help support a growing service business.



This is not just an assistant role. This is a high-level support role for someone who can help keep the business organized, moving, and growing. We need someone who can support the owner closely, help manage moving parts, support the team, improve systems, and help turn ideas into real execution.



The right person will be proactive, organized, detail-oriented, and strong with follow-through. They should be able to listen carefully, ask thoughtful questions to fully understand what is needed, and then carry things out accurately and efficiently.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys bringing structure to a fast-moving business, helping manage people and priorities, and turning ideas into action.



About the role



We are looking for someone who can act as a strong right-hand support person inside the business.



This person will help with operations, team coordination, communication, implementation, and general business support. They will help keep the owner out of every small detail by taking ideas, understanding the vision, and helping move things forward in an organized and thoughtful way.



This role requires someone who can balance:

 • listening carefully to direction

 • asking smart clarifying questions

 • taking initiative

 • following through

 • helping manage people and moving parts

 • improving systems as the business grows



Responsibilities may include:

 • Supporting day-to-day business operations

 • Helping manage team communication, follow-up, and accountability

 • Keeping projects, tasks, and moving parts organized

 • Helping turn ideas into real plans, systems, and completed actions

 • Assisting with process improvement and operational organization

 • Supporting client communication in a professional and friendly way

 • Supporting referral partner communication and follow-up

 • Helping manage backend administrative tasks

 • Keeping the owner informed while also helping reduce overwhelm

 • Helping ensure things do not get dropped as the business grows

 • Supporting team coordination and helping people stay on track

 • Helping create more structure, consistency, and follow-through in the business



We are especially looking for someone who:

 • Has experience supporting a small, growing service business

 • Understands how to work in a hands-on, fast-moving environment

 • Can help manage a team and keep people accountable

 • Is proactive, but does not make careless assumptions

 • Listens carefully and follows direction well

 • Asks thoughtful questions to understand what is wanted before moving forward

 • Can take ideas from the owner and help turn them into reality

 • Is strong at execution, organization, and follow-through

 • Is professional, personable, calm, and dependable

 • Is good with both people and operational details



The right person for this role is:

 • A strong listener

 • Detail-oriented

 • Organized

 • Proactive

 • Solutions-oriented

 • Friendly and professional

 • Good at communication

 • Good at managing moving parts

 • Comfortable helping manage others

 • Thoughtful, coachable, and dependable

 • Able to bridge the gap between ideas and execution



This is a good fit if you:

 • Enjoy helping a business owner stay organized and supported

 • Like bringing order to fast-moving situations

 • Are strong at follow-up and implementation

 • Can listen to a vision and help make it real

 • Are comfortable helping manage a team

 • Want a meaningful long-term role inside a growing company

 • Take pride in being dependable, thoughtful, and strong in execution



Important note



We are looking for someone who can listen intently, understand direction clearly, and execute accurately. We value initiative, but we also value someone who takes the time to understand the goal before acting.



This role is for someone who can help take what is in the owner’s head and help organize, implement, and move it into real life.

title: Business Development Representative
description:
About the Role

We are a growing healthcare staffing agency dedicated to connecting top-tier Registered Nurses (RNs) with the facilities that need them most. As our Business Development Representative, you are the "tip of the spear." Your primary mission is to identify, reach out to, and book meetings with key decision-makers (Chief Nursing Officers, HR Directors, and Unit Managers) at hospitals, LTC facilities, and clinics.



This is a high-activity, high-reward role. You won't just be making dials; you will be building the foundation of our client portfolio.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Prospecting: Conduct 50+ outbound touchpoints daily (calls, personalized
s, and LinkedIn outreach) to generate interest in our staffing services.



Lead Generation: Research and identify new facilities and key stakeholders within your assigned territory.



Discovery & Qualification: Conduct initial discovery calls to understand a facility's "pain points" (e.g., high burnout, reliance on expensive travel agencies, or census spikes).



Meeting Setting: Schedule high-quality meetings/presentations for the Agency Director to close.



CRM Management: Maintain clean records of all interactions in [Insert CRM name, e.g., HubSpot/Salesforce].



What We’re Looking For

The "Relentless" Mindset: You aren't discouraged by "no" or being transferred to voi
. You view every "no" as one step closer to a "yes."



Healthcare Literacy: You understand (or are willing to quickly learn) the difference between Per Diem, Travel, and Permanent Placement, as well as basic clinical settings (ICU, ER, Med-Surg).



Communication Skills: You can speak confidently with high-level executives and build rapport quickly over the phone.



Experience: 1–2 years of experience in outbound sales, recruitment, or a healthcare-related field is preferred, but we will train a high-energy "hunter."



Requirements

Proven track record of meeting or exceeding activity quotas.



Strong organizational skills and ability to manage a pipeline.



Professional phone presence and written communication.



[Optional] Familiarity with tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator, ZoomInfo, or Apollo.



Why Join Us?

Uncapped Commission: Competitive base salary plus a performance-based bonus for every meeting set or contract signed.



Growth Potential: As the agency grows, you will have the first opportunity to move into an Account Executive or Sales Management role.



Impact: Your work directly helps solve the nursing shortage by getting qualified RNs into the facilities where they are needed most.



Salary includes standard pay plus incentives for getting new clients onboarded, and annual bonus based on performance.

title: Hiring: Static Ad Creator for Dropshipping Brand
description:

We are looking for an experienced Static Ad Creator to join our team full-time and produce high-converting creatives for a dropshipping brand.



This is not a beginner design role. We want someone who has already worked in a static ad creation role for a dropshipping store or dropshipping supplement brand and can create winning ads with little to no guidance.



You must understand that great static ads are not just about making things look nice. Copy, positioning, creative strategy, and marketing psychology matter more than design alone. The ideal person knows how to create statics that actually convert.



What We’re Looking For



We want someone with strong experience in:



Creating static ads specifically for dropshipping products

Developing creatives independently without needing step-by-step direction

Writing or contributing strong ad copy that fits the creative

Understanding creative strategy, mechanisms, market awareness levels, and market sophistication

Knowing how to angle products based on customer pain points, desires, objections, and buying psychology

Translating marketing strategy into ad concepts that are built to perform

Most Important Requirement



A strong understanding of marketing and copywriting is even more important to us than pure design skill.



A person who can make something look good but does not understand why people buy will not be a fit.

We want someone who understands what actually moves the needle in direct response advertising.



Start your application with the word 'Freedom' so i know you read this.

You should have solid working knowledge of:



Photoshop

Canva

AI image generation tools such as Nano Banana, Seedream, OpenAI image generation, and similar platforms

Prompting LLMs like Claude and ChatGPT to assist with ideation, copy, hooks, and creative development

Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



Has already created statics for winning dropshipping campaigns

Understands direct response marketing

Can come up with concepts, hooks, and ad angles on your own

Knows how to balance design, copy, and strategy

Can work fast, think independently, and execute without hand-holding

Has experience in ecommerce, especially dropshipping or supplement brands

Schedule

Full-time

8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Philippines Time

Compensation

$800 – $1,200/month, depending on experience and skill level

Performance bonuses will also be paid based on results and contribution

To Apply



Please send:



Your portfolio or examples of static ads you created for dropshipping brands

A short summary of your experience in dropshipping creative production

The tools you use most often

A few examples of statics where your copy/angle/strategy helped performance



If you have only general graphic design experience but no real experience creating statics for dropshipping brands, this role is probably not the right fit.



We are looking for someone who already understands the game and can come in ready to create ads that sell.

title: Creative Strategist for AI-Driven Video and Image Ads
description:
We’re hiring a high-level Creative Strategist who can consistently generate winning ad angles, hooks, and scripts, and turn them into high-converting AI-powered creatives. This is not a basic designer or editor role. The role is primarily focused on thinking (angles, hooks, scripts) with execution as a secondary component. If you can’t write ads that stop the scroll and drive action, this isn’t for you.



Your main responsibility will be writing daily ad scripts for UGC-style videos, direct response ads, and short-form hooks (5–30 seconds). You should be able to come up with new angles, unique mechanisms, and strong emotional hooks, and turn simple offers into compelling narratives. You’ll also be responsible for developing creative strategy by identifying what’s working, what’s saturated, and what can be reframed, then building batches of creatives for testing.



We have a team of video editors for you to use and scale up your ideas, but you are expected to be able to generate your own AI Images and videos for them to use.



You will use AI tools to bring your scripts to life. Bonus if you have experience with newer tools.



You will be expected to produce 5–10 new scripts per day, develop multiple angles per offer, and create variations of winning creatives. You should be comfortable analyzing performance metrics like CTR, CVR, hook rate, and CPA, and iterating quickly based on what’s working. We care about speed, output, and performance — not perfection.



The ideal candidate has strong direct response copywriting experience, understands Meta ads, and has worked on campaigns with real spend (preferably $10K+/day). Experience in affiliate marketing, lead generation, or e-commerce is a big plus.



Compensation includes a base (hourly or monthly) plus a 10% profit share on ads you create. If your creatives perform, you participate directly in the upside with no cap. 



OTE is $10,000 USD+ per month.



To apply, send 3–5 ad scripts you’ve written that performed well, a short breakdown of why they worked and what the angle was, and the tools you use daily. You must also complete a short test: write 3 hooks and 1 full script for a product that protects your wallet from wireless theft. Applications without this will not be considered.



Do not apply if you rely entirely on AI to do the thinking, have no experience with real ad spend, or focus more on visuals than messaging. We care about results — if you can consistently produce winning angles and scripts, this role will pay extremely well.

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage and Co working space sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 

Enjoy interacting with customers, drive Sales, customer service and relationship management. 



- Actively manage customer enquiries through telephone,
 and messaging applications 



- Providing sales service & consultation to all potential customers 



- Working with Team to formulate marketing promotions and collateral 



- Building relationship with Co-working space, Self Storage and E-commence fulfilment centre customers. 





Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: Performance Marketing Manager
description:
PropZap — We’re Building a Dream Team to Shape the Future of Real Estate in North America.



We are not building just another brokerage.



We are building a scalable real estate platform designed to modernize how homes are bought and sold — through systems, technology, disciplined execution, and long-term vision.



Our ambition is not incremental growth.

It is structured, North American scale.



And we are intentionally building a high-caliber team aligned with that mission.



If you are driven by measurable impact.

If you believe performance marketing should compound over time.

If you want to build infrastructure, not just campaigns.



We want you to take the helm of our growth engine.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Performance Marketing Manager

Location: Remote

Shift: Aligned with Canada MST

Role Type: Any

Compensation: TBD

Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



This is a revenue-accountable growth leadership role.



You are directly responsible for building and scaling the paid acquisition engine that fuels expansion.



You will not simply execute instructions.



You will lead marketing performance strategy.



Your performance will be measured by qualified lead volume, conversion efficiency, disciplined optimization, and the strength of the systems you build.



You are expected to be the internal expert for marketing matters — the person leadership turns to for strategic insight, innovative ideas, and informed recommendations.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities:



Meta Ads Leadership (Most Critical)

• Manage and scale large-budget Meta Ads campaigns

• Architect structured campaign systems designed for scale

• Plan ad angles, hooks, positioning, and creative strategy

• Write high-converting direct-response copy

• Produce graphic and video ad creatives (for ads)

• Execute disciplined A/B testing frameworks

• Optimize based on cost per qualified lead and full-funnel data



You must have proven, hands-on experience managing significant ad budgets.



Landing Page Optimization (Squarespace)

• Optimize and improve our existing landing page (
)

• Increase conversion rates through structured experimentation

• Refine messaging clarity and CTA effectiveness

• Improve user journey and reduce friction

• Ensure advanced tracking accuracy



Future scope may include additional landing pages and funnel expansion as we scale.



 Marketing & Lead Management (HubSpot)

• Build and optimize structured
 nurture systems

• Segment and organize both new and existing leads

• Implement disciplined tagging and CRM organization

• Improve engagement and conversion rates

• Maintain clean, scalable list architecture

• Ensure seamless handoff of qualified leads



Analytics, Tracking & Attribution

• Implement advanced tracking systems (Pixel, CAPI, UTM strategy)

• Maintain CRM attribution clarity from click to handoff

• Analyze full-funnel performance, not surface metrics

• Identify bottlenecks and propose structured improvements

• Document A/B tests and build repeatable optimization frameworks



Marketing Leadership & Innovation

• Proactively propose innovative growth strategies

• Stay current with emerging trends, tools, platforms, and advertising strategies

• Evaluate new opportunities and recommend adoption when appropriate

• Serve as the internal authority on paid growth and performance marketing

• Guide leadership decisions with data and informed insight



You are not just executing campaigns.



You are setting direction.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who You Are:



You are driven by growth, ownership, and long-term impact.

• Proven, hands-on experience managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Deep understanding of direct-response marketing and buyer psychology

• Ability to independently plan creative angles and performance strategy

• Strong copywriting and positioning skills

• Comfortable producing ad creatives when required

• Strong analytical thinking and disciplined testing mindset

• Structured in documentation and optimization

• Accountable for measurable outcomes

• Continuously learning and staying ahead of platform changes and trends



Highly Ideal:

• Real estate marketing experience

• Experience promoting brokerages to attract agents

• Experience generating buyer and seller leads

• Understanding how to position real estate services competitively



Requirements:

• Demonstrated success managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Strong landing page optimization experience

• Advanced analytics and tracking knowledge

• Experience using HubSpot for segmentation and
 marketing

• Experience implementing structured A/B testing systems

• Reliable remote setup



Bonus If You Have:

• SEO experience

• Google Ads experience

• AI tools and automation knowledge

• Zapier or workflow automation experience

• Advanced CRM tagging and list organization skills



--------------------------------------------------------------



What We Offer:

• A long-term opportunity inside a scaling North American proptech platform

• Direct collaboration with founders

• Meaningful ownership of paid acquisition performance

• The opportunity to architect and refine the company’s growth engine

• Clear path toward future Head of Marketing

• Real influence on continental expansion



We are building a team designed to scale.



The platform is expanding.

The systems are strengthening.

The ambition is long-term.



We are looking for someone who sees themselves not just as a marketing manager — but as the growth leader who helps steer the direction of a North American real estate platform.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume (required)

• Portfolio (required)

• Case studies or performance summaries of Meta campaigns (required)

• Summary of budgets managed (required)

• Intro video (preferred)

• Expected monthly compensation (required)

• Internet speed test link (required)

• Any DISC test result (if available)



Subject Line: Performance Marketing Manager – Your Name



NOTE: Failure to follow the application instructions exactly will result in disqualification. Attention to detail matters, and the application process reflects the level of discipline we value.



If you are ready to take the helm of our growth engine and help build the future of real estate in North America, we want to hear from you.

title: AI UGC Video Creator & Editor (Remote)
description:
We're a UK-based DTC brand launching a new consumer device. We need someone who can both generate AI UGC videos and edit them into scroll-stopping ad creatives for Meta and TikTok.

What you'll do:

— Generate AI talking head videos using tools like Kling, Hedra, Captions.ai, and ElevenLabs

— Select and create AI avatars, voices, and scripts that feel authentic and native to platform

— Edit short-form video ads (15-60s) from the AI footage you generate

— Add captions, hooks, CTAs, b-roll overlays, transitions, and sound design

— Produce multiple variations per concept for split testing (different hooks, different CTAs, different pacing)

— Follow brand guidelines and creative briefs

What we're looking for:

— Hands-on experience generating AI UGC content (not just editing it)

— Strong portfolio of DTC / e-commerce video ads

— Knows how to make AI-generated footage feel natural and human

— Familiar with what performs on Meta and TikTok (pacing, hooks, retention patterns)

— Fast turnaround — we test a lot and move quickly

— CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Nice to have:

— Experience with multiple AI video tools (Kling, Runway, Hedra, HeyGen, Captions.ai)

— Can generate or source b-roll, product shots, lifestyle clips

— Understanding of direct response creative (problem-agitate-solve, before/after, testimonial formats)

— Experience with AI voice cloning / text-to-speech (ElevenLabs, etc.)

We'll provide creative briefs, brand assets, and scripts. You generate the AI footage, edit, and deliver ready-to-run ad creatives.

title: E-Commerce Customer Support Specialist
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a reliable customer-focused E-Commerce Customer Support Specialist to join our team. In this role, you will handle customer inquiries through Amazon messages and FreshDesk
s, ensuring timely and professional responses. You will help resolve issues, provide accurate information, and maintain high customer satisfaction while supporting our Amazon store operations.





Compensation & Work Arrangement

- Starting salary: $500 USD per month

- Full-time position: 40 hours per week

- 8 hours per day, 5 days per week

- 20 days paid time off and 10 days of sick leave

- Work from home, fully remote





Candidate Profile

The ideal candidate has experience supporting Amazon customers and managing
-based inquiries using tools like FreshDesk. Clear and professional communication, strong attention to detail, and the ability to quickly understand and resolve customer issues are essential. This role requires someone who is organized, reliable, and able to handle multiple tasks while consistently delivering high-quality support.





Responsibilities

- Respond to Amazon customer messages and FreshDesk
s promptly and professionally

- Handle inquiries related to orders, shipping, returns, refunds, and product questions

- Track and manage order fulfillment and logistics using internal logistics software (training provided)

- Use Shopify to access customer order information and support order-related inquiries

- Maintain internal records, track tasks, and follow-ups using ClickUp

- Resolve customer complaints while following Amazon policies and internal guidelines

- Collaborate with internal teams for order issues, replacements, or escalations

- Stay updated on Amazon policies, seller guidelines, and product knowledge

- Identify recurring issues and suggest improvements to processes or tools

- Maintain a professional tone to support positive seller feedback and ratings





Requirements

- Experience in Amazon customer support or Seller Central operations

- Proficient in handling
 support using FreshDesk, Zendesk, or similar platforms

- Familiarity with Shopify for order review and customer support inquiries

- Excellent written communication skills with attention to detail

- Ability to handle refunds, returns, and customer complaints effectively

- Strong problem-solving and critical-thinking skills

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks efficiently

- Familiarity with Amazon policies, metrics, and best practices





Tools & Platforms

- Amazon Seller Central

- FreshDesk CRM

- Shopify

- Flowspace

- ClickUp

- Slack

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets)



To submit your application, kindly complete the form below:




Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you!

title: Vendoo Listing Specialist (eBay and Shopify SEO Focus)
description:
We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work. We value hard work and strong attention to detail. This role is for someone who wants to grow, learn the product, and produce high quality listings every day.



What you will do

Create and post listings daily using Vendoo

Optimize titles and descriptions for SEO

Post across platforms with strong focus on eBay and Shopify

Review all photos and match them correctly to listings

Follow listing guidelines with accuracy every time



Standards

Zero tolerance for careless mistakes

If photos or listings are not checked properly, you will not continue past day one

Attention to detail is required

You must take ownership of your work



Requirements

Experience with Vendoo

Strong experience with eBay and Shopify is preferred

Strong understanding of SEO for eBay and Shopify

Must know how to use Shopify

Comfortable working with a team

Willing to learn products to reduce mistakes to near zero

Reliable internet and consistent availability



Application Instructions

Create one eBay listing and one Shopify listing for a Louis Vuitton Neverfull MM Azur

Include your words per minute

Confirm you understand the work schedule of 5 AM to 5 PM and that you will be working as part of a team



Make sure it is a Louis Vuitton Neverfull MM Azur

Not PM

Not GM



Make sure there are no listing errors

Title matches the item

Description matches the item

Details are consistent all the way through



If the size is wrong or anything does not match

Reject immediately



We are checking accuracy, not effort.



Experience is required. Sample work is required.



Send your sample work right away. We are moving quickly and ready to hire.

title: FULL-CYCLE SALES SUPPORT VA (HUBSPOT, US CLIENTS)
description:
ABOUT VSL

Vanderburgh Sober Living is a US-based nonprofit organization that supports addiction recovery group homes across the United States. We exist to make community-based sober housing more accessible, and we do this by equipping and supporting local operators through shared standards, tools, and services.



WHY WORK HERE?

We pay well and treat our team with respect and transparency. Our VAs have real growth opportunities and a voice in how work gets done. We do not micromanage or use invasive time trackers because we hire professionals and trust them to perform. In return, we expect high standards, strong execution, and consistent follow-through. We are not building a revolving door of short-term hires. We are building a long-term team of A-players who take ownership, deliver results, and want to grow with a mission-driven organization. Learn more: 
/how-we-work-with-vas/



POSITION SUMMARY

We are hiring a Full-Cycle Sales Support VA to support our US-based sales team and communicate directly with prospective customers. This role reports to the sales team and is responsible for managing lead communication, maintaining HubSpot accuracy, and helping move deals from first contact through enrollment with a high level of organization and professionalism.



DUTIES

-- Engage inbound leads via
, text, and phone calls; respond promptly and professionally

-- Support discovery and qualification conversations with prospects using provided scripts

-- Manage follow-up inside HubSpot CRM, ensuring no lead is missed and all tasks are completed on time

-- Guide prospects through our enrollment and decision process with a clear, supportive communication style

-- Maintain accurate CRM records in HubSpot (notes, deal stages, activities, and next steps)

-- Coordinate daily with US-based sales tea
mbers via Teams to support active deals and priorities

-- Keep the sales pipeline clean, organized, and actionable, including task management and deal updates

-- Document workflows and update SOPs as processes improve; submit weekly activity and pipeline reports



QUALIFICATIONS

-- English: strong written and conversational fluency with clear, professional communication

-- Experience: 3–5+ years in sales support, customer-facing VA work, or inside sales with US-based clients

-- Tools & software: HubSpot CRM (or similar), Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Office,
, and calendar tools

-- Skills: detail-oriented, organized, proactive, able to manage multiple conversations and tasks simultaneously

-- Communication style: professional, patient, and supportive; not aggressive or overly sales-driven

-- Nice-to-have: experience in nonprofit, real estate, or service-based industries

-- Internet & setup: reliable high-speed internet, backup connection, and quiet workspace for calls



SCHEDULE

FULL-TIME; Monday through Friday with required overlap: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM Eastern Time (US).

Expected responsiveness: within 1 hour during working hours; same-day follow-ups required.



COMPENSATION

USD $800 per month, based on experience, plus performance-based incentives tied to pipeline activity and closed deals; potential increases after performance reviews.



HOW TO APPLY

Message subject: “HUBSPOT – [YOUR NAME]”.

Include a short introduction, why you are interested in VSL and this role, your top 3 relevant experiences, your expected monthly rate, your weekly availability, and an internet speed test link

Include a 1–3 minute voice or video introduction describing your experience supporting sales or working with US customers

Applications without the secret word (HUBSPOT) will not be reviewed



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (FIRST 90 DAYS)

-- On-time follow-ups and consistent communication with minimal supervision

-- Clean, accurate HubSpot data with fully updated deals, notes, and tasks

-- Proactive coordination with the sales team resulting in smoother deal progression

-- Improved response times and reliable execution across all assigned leads

title: Cold Email Outreach VA
description:
Cold
 Outreach VA

~10 hrs/week 





THE ROLE



We're a UK-based WordPress support company launching cold
 outreach to generate B2B leads. We need a detail-oriented VA to manage the day-to-day operations: monitoring campaigns in Instantly, keeping deliverability healthy across 12 mailboxes, building and verifying prospect lists, categorising replies, and keeping our CRM accurate.



Strategy, copywriting, and sequence design are already handled. You own the execution and data quality. The founder and others handle analysis and reporting, so this is a focused, operational role.





OUR STACK



This is exactly what you will be working with:



Instantly - Cold
 sending, warmup, deliverability monitoring, and B2B lead finding. This is the tool you'll live in.

HubSpot CRM - Sales pipeline for interested leads. You'll update deal stages and log interactions.

Also used - 
 (project management), Wappalyzer (WordPress verification), Google Sheets (data cleaning and list prep), Google Docs (reports).



You may also need to work with:


 - Secondary B2B prospecting and lead enrichment. May become primary lead source.

Reoon -
 verification before lists go into campaigns.



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU



- Hands-on Instantly experience (required). You've managed mailboxes, monitored warmup and deliverability, uploaded lists, and categorised replies in Instantly before.

- Deliverability knowledge (required). You understand SPF, DKIM, DMARC, bounce rates, and spam complaints well enough to spot problems before they escalate.

- Strong Google Sheets skills (required). Filtering, deduplication, VLOOKUP, data cleaning.

-
 verification experience (required). You know the difference between valid, catch-all, risky, and invalid, and what to do with each.

- HubSpot CRM experience (preferred). Our sales pipeline runs on HubSpot. You'll be updating deal stages and logging lead interactions, not building complex automations.

- Meticulous attention to detail (critical). A bad list upload or missed deliverability drop burns domains that take weeks to recover. If you're the type of person who receives an
 with five questions and only answers three of them, this role is not a good fit. We need someone who reads everything thoroughly and responds completely.

- English C1 or above (required). Written English must be clear and professional. You will be categorising English-language replies, writing brief daily reports, and communicating with the founder. Comfort working alongside AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) is also expected.





WHAT WE OFFER



Stable, ongoing work with a growing UK company. Clear processes and daily support from the founder. Training on our specific workflows. Flexible schedule (must overlap 10am-4pm CET). Payment every two weeks via Wise. Room to grow as we scale.





TO APPLY



Include all of the following or your application will not be reviewed:



1. Start your application with the word "Deliverability".

2. Describe your Instantly experience: how many mailboxes, daily
 volume, and whether you've used Instantly's B2B Lead Finder.

3. Name any other tools from our stack you've used (Apollo, Reoon, HubSpot, 
, Wappalyzer etc).

4. Give one example of a data quality or deliverability issue you caught before it caused damage.

5. Your available hours, timezone, and hourly rate in USD.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Virtual Assistant (Sales & Operations Support)
description:

Monday to Friday, 9:00am – 5:00pm (UK Time)





-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Performance Expectations

s)

title: Print Newsletter Graphic Design
description:
Hello,



We publish newsletters for many communities. They are mostly print but some re e-newsletters. We use InDesign, Illustrator and Photoshop. Mainly, InDesign. Also Word and little Excel. 



These are usually monthly publications and primarily is updated the last month issue to the current month issue and preparing for print.



We would provide a prepped blank pdf with ad spaces and other regular items already in. The job is to insert the new articles that are sent in.  We also would provide an older publication pdf as a go by. 



I am looking for someone who can take on regular work on a part time or full-time basis and get to know us and our customers to create great looking newsletters for them.  As time goes by we may include additional work/responsibilities and teach new skills.

title: Operations + Executive Admin Support

title: Marketing Strategist + Video Editor for Growing Service Brand
description:
Marketing Strategist + Video Editor for Growing Service Brand

TikTok | Instagram |
 | YouTube



We are looking for a creative, strategic, and dependable Marketing Strategist + Video Editor to help grow our brand through strong content, thoughtful marketing support, and polished video editing.



This role is for someone who understands both the strategy behind marketing and the execution needed to make content look professional and perform well across TikTok, Instagram,
, and YouTube.



We need someone who can help turn ideas, raw footage, and business goals into clear, elevated, engaging content that supports growth, builds trust, and helps attract the right audience.



This is not just a basic editing role. We are looking for someone who can help think through content direction, create stronger marketing ideas, improve messaging, and edit videos that feel polished and appealing to a U.S. audience.



About the role



You will help support the brand through content planning, marketing input, and video editing for social media and video platforms. Most of the content will center around before-and-after transformations, organizing projects, lifestyle content, educational content, service-focused content, and brand-building content.



You should be able to help with both:

 • Marketing strategy — helping shape what content to create, how to position it, how it should be adapted by platform, and how to make it more effective

 • Video editing — taking raw clips and turning them into polished, engaging short-form and long-form content



We want someone who can help us create content that feels:

 • Clean

 • Elevated

 • Professional

 • Warm

 • Visually appealing

 • Aligned with a premium service brand



Responsibilities may include:

 • Creating content ideas for TikTok, Instagram,
, and YouTube

 • Helping plan content around services, brand awareness, promotions, educational topics, and audience growth

 • Editing short-form videos for Reels, TikTok, Stories, Shorts, and
 content

 • Editing longer-form or adapted content for YouTube

 • Turning raw before-and-after footage into polished content

 • Suggesting hooks, captions, text overlays, video structure, and content angles

 • Adapting content appropriately across different platforms

 • Improving content so it feels more engaging for the U.S. market

 • Helping maintain brand consistency in tone, visuals, and messaging

 • Recommending ways to improve content performance over time

 • Supporting marketing campaigns and promotional content as needed



Must have experience with:

 • Video editing for short-form social content

 • TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 content, and YouTube/YouTube Shorts

 • Marketing strategy or social media content strategy

 • Text overlays, pacing, transitions, and strong reel flow

 • Content planning and idea generation

 • Writing or refining captions, hooks, and content direction

 • Editing content that feels polished and professional, not overly busy, sloppy, or low quality



Required tools / setup:

 • You must have your own paid editing and design programs

 • You must already be working from paid versions of the software you use

 • Please do not apply if you only use free trials, free apps, or heavily limited free versions

 • You should have reliable access to the tools you need to do high-quality work consistently



We are especially looking for someone who:

 • Understands how to market a service-based business

 • Knows how to create content that works across TikTok, Instagram,
, and YouTube

 • Understands that each platform has different strengths and audience behavior

 • Can create videos that feel clean, modern, and elevated

 • Knows how to make content appealing to a U.S. audience

 • Understands that good marketing is not just posting content, but creating the right content

 • Can take direction but also bring smart ideas to the table

 • Is creative, organized, and proactive

 • Has a good visual eye and strong taste

 • Understands brand tone and can keep content consistent



Ideal qualities:

 • Strong editing skills

 • Strong sense of branding and aesthetics

 • Good instincts for hooks and content structure

 • Able to think strategically, not just execute instructions

 • Strong written English

 • Detail-oriented and dependable

 • Open to feedback and able to improve quickly

 • Interested in long-term growth with a brand



This role is a good fit if you:

 • Love both strategy and creative execution

title: Automation & Agentic Systems Specialist — Long-Term, ET Hours Required
description:
Altos Vantage Agentic (AVA) is a US-based boutique AI-driven outbound lead generation agency. We are looking for a long-term staff member — not a one-off freelancer — who wants to grow with us as we scale.

We run a purpose-built tech stack: Apollo, Instantly, Make (formerly Integromat), and GoHighLevel. You will be a key operator inside this stack, building and maintaining the systems that power our client delivery.

This starts at 5-10 hours per week and will grow to 20-30+ hours as we onboard more clients. We pay reliably, we communicate clearly, and we treat our tea
mbers with respect. If you do great work, your hours and rate will grow with us.

This is a remote position. You must be available during Eastern Time business hours (9am-6pm ET). This is a firm requirement — please do not apply if you cannot commit to ET availability.

WHAT YOU WILL DO



Build, test, and maintain Make (formerly Integromat) scenarios connecting Apollo, Instantly, GoHighLevel, and other tools

Set up and manage GoHighLevel sub-accounts, pipelines, and automated workflows for clients

Build and deploy custom AI agents — not just use them, actually ship them

Help onboard new clients onto our tech stack

Troubleshoot issues when they arise

Document everything clearly in Google Workspace



YOU MUST HAVE ALL OF THE FOLLOWING



Make (formerly Integromat) — proven hands-on experience building real, live scenarios

GoHighLevel — sub-account setup, pipelines, workflows, API usage

Apollo and/or Instantly —
 sequencing, lead sourcing, domain and inbox setup

AI and LLM agent deployment — you have built and shipped something real, not just experimented

Strong written English — you can communicate clearly with a US-based founder

Availability during Eastern Time hours (9am-6pm ET)



NICE TO HAVE



Experience with B2B outbound lead generation workflows

Familiarity with Zapier or n8n

 deliverability and inbox warming knowledge



HOW TO APPLY — PLEASE READ CAREFULLY

Do not send a generic application. Complete our application form at the link below. Applications without a completed form will not be reviewed.

The form asks you to:



Share a Loom video (3-5 minutes) walking through a Make scenario you built

Describe a GoHighLevel sub-account you set up

Describe an AI agent you deployed

Confirm your ET availability

State your hourly rate in USD



Apply here:

title: Legal Professional
description:
Freelance Legal Professional Wanted – Luxury Fashion Brand (Hey Doll Couture)



Hey Doll Couture is a growing luxury fashion eCommerce brand seeking an experienced freelance legal professional to develop a comprehensive suite of contracts, agreements, and legal policies to support our business operations.



This is a project-based opportunity ideal for a legal professional with experience in eCommerce, fashion law, intellectual property, and contract drafting preferably knowledge under Australian law - or willingness to conduct research. 





Scope of Work



You will be responsible for drafting, reviewing, and advising on the following:

1. eCommerce & Website Legal Documents



* Terms & Conditions (Website Use & Sales)

* Privacy Policy (Privacy Act compliant)

* Returns & Refund Policy (Australian Consumer Law compliant)

* Shipping Policy

* Payment Terms

* Website Disclaimer

* Cookie Policy (if applicable)



2. Intellectual Property Protection



* Advice and documentation relating to trademarks and brand protection

* Clauses ensuring full ownership of designs, branding, and creative assets



3. Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs)



* NDAs for designers, manufacturers, and collaborators

* Strong confidentiality protections for original designs and business operations



4. Freelancer & Contractor Agreements

Draft legally binding agreements for:



* Models

* Makeup artists / beauty professionals

* Photographers & videographers

* Content creators / social media collaborators



These agreements must include:



* Clear intellectual property ownership (all content owned by Hey Doll Couture)

* Confidentiality clauses

* A strict clause stating that **any privately filmed or behind-the-scenes content associated with Hey Doll Couture must not be used, published, or distributed without prior written consent or without an approved contract in place**



5. Influencer & Affiliate Agreements



* Deliverables, usage rights, and compliance with advertising standards



6. Supplier / Manufacturer Agreements



* Protection of designs, confidentiality, timelines, and quality expectations





**What We’re Looking For**



* Proven experience in contract drafting and commercial law

* Experience working with fashion, eCommerce, or creative industries (highly preferred)

* Strong understanding of Australian legal requirements (ACL, Privacy Act, etc.)

* Ability to deliver clear, enforceable, and professionally structured documents

* High attention to detail and confidentiality

* Someone able to become a partner to be the legal consultant for our growing brand - long term 







**How to Apply**



Please submit:



* A brief introduction and relevant experience

* Examples of similar legal work (if available)

* Your rates or project pricing

* Estimated turnaround time





Join us in building a legally secure and elevated foundation for a luxury fashion brand.



Hey Doll Couture

Key Responsibilities

- Recruitment & Onboarding: Source, interview, and hire top-tier English-speaking sales agents who can confidently pitch US decision-makers.

- Training & Development: Ensure our training material is followed, objection-handling guides, and comprehensive training programs to ensure agents are prepared to hit the phones.

- Performance Management: Monitor daily call metrics, conversion rates, and KPIs. Provide 1-on-1 coaching, QA call reviews, and continuous feedback to maximize the team's output.

- Operations & Strategy: Set up and manage dialing systems, track team attendance, ensure adherence to the EST schedule, and report directly to ownership on team ROI.



Requirements

- Experience: 3+ years in a Call Center/BPO leadership role, specifically managing outbound B2B sales, lead generation, or appointment-setting teams.

- Team Building: Proven track record of recruiting, and onboarding, 

- Shift Readiness: Must be comfortable, healthy, and reliable working the graveyard shift to overlap seamlessly with US EST office hours (e.g., 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST).

- Communication: Flawless written and spoken English, with the ability to coach agents on understanding US business culture and professional B2B etiquette.

- Tech-Savvy: Experience with CRM software, teams, and remote workforce monitoring tools.



Compensation & Benefits

- Base Pay: $1,700 - ,2,600 USD per month (depending on experience).

- Performance Bonuses: Uncapped commission overrides based on the team's successful conversions/bookings.

- Work Arrangement: 100% Remote / Permanent Work-From-Home.



HOW TO APPLY (STRICT INSTRUCTIONS)



Due to high volume, we will only review applications that follow this exact format. If you do not follow these instructions, your application will be immediately deleted.



1. Subject Line: Your response subject line must be exactly: EST Team Builder - [Your First and Last Name]



2. The Body of Your Message:

Do NOT send a traditional cover letter. We only want three things in the body of your message, formatted exactly as follows:



Part 1: The Metrics (3 Bullet Points Only)

- The largest outbound sales team you have personally hired and managed.

- The specific product/service your team was selling, and to whom (B2B or B2C).

- One concrete metric of success your team achieved under your leadership.



Part 2: The Tech Stack

- List the dialers, CRMs, and team management tools you are highly proficient in (Comma-separated list only). 



Part 3: The Voice Note (Required)

- Provide a link to a 60-second audio recording (using 
 or a similar simple link) introducing yourself, confirming you understand the EST graveyard shift requirements, and stating why you are the right person to build this team. 



Thanks for reading!

title: Client Intake Specialist
description:
I am seeking for an Intake Specialist that will serve as the primary point of contact for new and active clients, ensuring a seamless onboarding experience and effective coordination of services. This role focuses on client relationship management, referral monitoring, service coordination, and authorization tracking to support efficient service delivery and high client satisfaction.

Responsibilities:



Client Onboarding & Relationship Management

•Serve as the primary contact for new inquiries and active clients

•Build and maintain trusting client relationships

•Guide clients through onboarding and ensure accurate documentation of required information



Referral Management

•Monitor and manage client referrals across departments

•Collaborate with referral sources to maintain partnerships and support client acquisition



Service Coordination

•Assess client needs and match them with appropriate services and clinicians

•Coordinate schedules, availability, and authorizations

•Identify and resolve service delivery barriers proactively



Authorization Utilization & Compliance

•Review and manage client authorizations to ensure optimal service use

•Maintain accurate waitlist and authorization records

•Provide updates to clients and internal teams



Collaboration with Teams

•Work closely with clinical and administrative departments

•Serve as liaison between clients and internal teams

•Support smooth transitions and issue resolution



Client Retention & Satisfaction

•Engage regularly with clients to assess satisfaction

•Collect and analyze feedback to improve service delivery

•Recommend enhancements to the overall client experience



Qualifications:

•Minimum of 2 years of relevant experience (required)

•Experience in ABA, Speech Therapy, or Occupational Therapy environments required

•Experience working in scheduling or intake departments required

•Must be willing and able to work within 8:30am-5:30pm Pacific (US) business hours



Apply via: 
/apply/
uzd

title: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner
description:
Job Requisition: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner

Position: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner (US Market)

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Work Schedule: 40 hours per week, Monday – Friday. Must be available to work within 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM US Pacific Standard Time (PST), which is 12:00 AM (Midnight) – 10:00 AM Philippine Time (PHT).



Compensation: 40,000 – 55,000 PHP / month (Depending on experience)



We are a premier Virtual Assistant and AI agency dedicated to pairing world-class talent with top-performing businesses. We believe in empowering our tea
mbers, leveraging cutting-edge technology, and delivering unmatched operational excellence to our clients.



Role Overview

We are seeking an elite Virtual Operations Partner to own the operational movement of our clients' real estate businesses. Your core objective is to create predictable, scalable operations by managing transaction coordination, listing management, marketing execution, and CRM integrity. You will ensure that no contingency expires unnoticed, no deadline is missed, and the agent’s time is concentrated on revenue-generating activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Transaction & Listing Control

Contract-to-Close Management: Track timelines, monitor contingencies, coordinate inspections/appraisals, and communicate with escrow to ensure seamless closings.

Listing Management: Execute pre-listing checklists, schedule photographers, coordinate staging, ensure MLS data accuracy, and set up showing instructions. Listings must be launched organized and correctly positioned.

Buyer Workflow: Coordinate offer preparation, organize disclosure packets, set up timeline calendars, and track closing checklists.



Marketing & Database Management

Marketing Execution: Support digital presence via Canva graphic design, social media scheduling, SEO/SEM strategies,
 campaign deployment, and open house material preparation. Brand presentation must remain consistent and error-free.

CRM Integrity: Maintain contact entry accuracy, segment databases, log transactions, create follow-up tasks, and generate pipeline reports.



Communication: Ensure all written communication is clear, structured, and timely. Proactively update clients and vendors on current status, required actions, and timeline impacts.

Daily Operational Rhythm



Start of Day: Review all active transactions, confirm deadlines within 7 days, and identify risk points.

Midday: Follow up on inspections, escrow, and lenders; update the CRM; and confirm vendor timelines.

End of Day: Document transaction progress, prepare next-day priorities, and flag any compliance or risk items.



Qualifications & Requirements

Experience: Minimum of 3+ years experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant, Transaction Coordinator, or Operations Manager, with a mandatory focus on the US Real Estate industry.

Language: Exceptional, highly proficient English skills. Ability to write persuasive, error-free copy and professional transaction updates for an American audience.



Technical Skills: Proven expertise in real estate CRMs, MLS platforms, and transaction management software. Strong proficiency in Canva and foundational SEO/SEM.

Systemization: Ability to build and maintain listing checklist templates, buyer workflows, vendor contact lists, and compliance tracking forms.



Work-From-Home Infrastructure Requirements

Audio Equipment: A high-quality, professional-grade noise-canceling headset is mandatory.

Internet: Access to fast, reliable fiber-optic internet (minimum 50 Mbps) AND a reliable backup internet source.

Power: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) or backup generator to ensure zero downtime.

Environment: A dedicated, quiet workspace free from household distractions.

title: Creative Strategist DTC Beauty Skincare brand
description:
**Creative Strategist – Beauty & Skincare Brand**



**About the Role**



We are a fast-growing DTC beauty & skincare brand scaling through paid social, creator content, and performance-driven marketing.



We are looking for an experienced Creative Strategist to take ownership of our creative direction and lead the development of high-performing ad concepts.



This role is responsible for turning customer insights, market research, and performance data into creative strategies that drive profitable growth.



You will work closely with the founder, media buyers, and creative team to develop winning ad angles, oversee creative production, and continuously improve creative performance across platforms.



---



**Key Responsibilities**



• Lead the development of new advertising angles, hooks, and messaging frameworks

• Translate customer insights and research into high-performing ad concepts

• Write clear creative briefs and scripts for ads and video content

• Analyze ad performance data and identify winning patterns

• Guide the creative team (editors, creators, UGC partners) to execute concepts effectively

• Continuously test new ideas, formats, and storytelling approaches

• Help structure and improve the brand’s creative testing process



---



**What We’re Looking For**



• Proven experience in creative strategy, copywriting, or performance marketing within DTC/eCommerce

• Strong understanding of direct response marketing and consumer psychology

• Experience creating ad concepts for Meta, TikTok, or other paid social platforms

• Ability to translate performance data into actionable creative insights

• Strong storytelling and messaging skills

• Highly organized and able to manage multiple creative tests simultaneously



---



**Bonus If You Have Experience With**



• Beauty, skincare, or wellness brands

• UGC-driven advertising

• Scaling paid social campaigns



---



**When Applying, Please Answer:**



1. Share 2–3 ads or campaigns you developed that performed well

2. How do you usually come up with new ad angles for a product?

3. What results did your creatives achieve (ROAS, CPA, scale, etc.)?



---





We are not looking for beginners — you should have proven experience creating ads that generate real results.

title: A/B Testing Specialist
description:
We’re looking for an experienced A/B Testing & Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist to help us scale our e-commerce brands through data-driven experimentation.



You’ll be responsible for planning, executing, and analyzing A/B tests across landing pages, product pages, offers, creatives, and funnels — turning insights into clear, actionable improvements.



Experience in the beauty or skincare niche is a strong bonus.



What You’ll Do

Design and run A/B and multivariate tests across:

Product pages (PDPs)

Landing pages

Funnels & checkout flows

Offers, pricing, and bundles

Copy, layouts, and UX elements

Develop clear test hypotheses based on data, user behavior, and psychology

Analyze results and translate data into clear recommendations

Prioritize tests based on potential impact and effort

Collaborate with design, marketing, and content teams

Continuously improve conversion rates, AOV, and revenue



What We’re Looking For:

Proven experience running high-volume A/B tests for e-commerce brands

Strong understanding of CRO, user behavior, and conversion psychology

Hands-on experience with A/B testing and analytics tools (e.g. GA4, Hotjar, VWO, Convert, Optimizely, or similar)

Ability to explain results clearly — not just the numbers, but the why

Detail-oriented, structured, and highly analytical

Self-driven and comfortable owning experiments end-to-end



Nice to Have (Bonus):

Experience in beauty, skincare, or wellness e-commerce

Experience using Intelligems (pricing tests, offers, bundles, subscriptions)

Familiarity with Shopify ecosystems

Experience optimizing for Meta Ads / TikTok traffic

Understanding of subscription models and bundles

Experience working with UGC-driven funnels



Please send us your portfolio link when you apply.



Thanks!

title: Creative Strategist DTC
description:
About the Role



We are a fast-scaling DTC beauty and skincare brand doing 6 figures per month, and we’re looking for a Creative Strategist to lead the development of high-performing ad concepts for Meta 
 & Instagram).



You will research, ideate, and create ad concepts that convert — using storytelling, emotional triggers, and proven direct-response principles.

Your goal is to turn insights into creative strategies that drive real sales and help scale the brand to the next level.



You’ll work directly with the founder and marketing team, with full creative freedom and support to test, learn, and grow.

- Write clear creative briefs for video editors and UGC creators.

We are a small, established WordPress support and services team working with clients across the UK, USA, and Europe.



We are looking for experienced WordPress professionals who can assist with troubleshooting, support, and development work when additional capacity is needed.



This is not a full-time salaried role.



Work is assigned on an as-needed basis, and hours may vary depending on ticket volume and project requirements. Work may range from a few hours per month to several hours per week depending on demand.



This role suits someone who already works independently (freelance or contract) and wants a reliable source of WordPress work alongside their existing commitments.



About the Role



You will assist the team with technical WordPress support and development tasks when additional capacity is needed.



Work may include troubleshooting complex WordPress issues, resolving plugin conflicts, fixing layout problems, improving performance, or implementing development changes requested by clients.



You will be expected to investigate problems carefully, explain what you find, and implement reliable solutions.



Typical Work You May Handle



Troubleshooting WordPress errors and site issues



Resolving plugin conflicts and update problems



Fixing layout issues in Elementor or other page builders



WooCommerce troubleshooting and configuration



Investigating and improving slow websites



Performing WordPress updates and maintenance checks



Implementing development changes requested by clients



Diagnosing and fixing bugs on live websites



Performing site migrations when needed



Communicating clearly with the team about progress and any blockers



What We Expect



Real, hands-on WordPress experience (not just courses or theory)



Ability to diagnose problems independently and explain your reasoning



Clear, professional written English



Reliability and honest communication about availability and workload



A private, quiet workspace and stable internet connection



Ability to work independently without constant supervision



Availability with at least partial overlap with CET working hours



Requirements



Practical WordPress experience (3+ years preferred)



Strong troubleshooting and diagnostic skills



Experience working with Elementor or similar page builders



Working knowledge of WooCommerce



Solid understanding of WordPress plugins, themes, and updates



Experience identifying and resolving performance issues



Clear written English (C1 level or above)



Stable internet connection and private workspace



Nice to Have



Experience with additional builders such as Divi, Avada, WPBakery, or Enfold



Experience with membership plugins or LMS platforms



Experience documenting technical work clearly for teams or clients



Familiarity with Slack or project management tools



Working Style



Tasks are assigned through our internal systems and communication tools.



You will review the task, investigate the issue, implement the solution, and document clearly what was done.



We value clear communication, reliability, and people who take ownership of solving problems properly.



Hourly Rate



Please include your hourly rate in USD when applying.



Application Process



Step 1

Complete the application form using the link below.




 



Step 2

After submitting the form, reply to this job post with the message:



Application submitted.



This helps us confirm that your application was received successfully.



Application Requirements



Complete all required fields in the application form



Provide real examples of WordPress issues you have solved



Provide links to WordPress sites you have worked on



Give an honest assessment of your skills and availability



We look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Lead Generation Manager
description:
Job Title  

Lead Generation Manager  

(B2B Services, Full-Time)  




  



---



About the role  



We run a profitable WordPress support and services business with an established client base and a strong delivery team. What we are deliberately building next is a predictable, well-run lead generation function.



This role exists to own that outcome.



We are looking for a senior lead generation professional who has already built and run B2B lead generation for services or agencies, and who is comfortable taking responsibility for both strategy and execution.



This is not a junior SDR role, and not a growth hacker position. It is a role for someone who understands that good lead generation is systematic, evidence-led, and improves through disciplined iteration.



---



What you will own  



- Defining and refining our ideal customer profile for services and support  

- Designing and running outbound and content-led lead generation  

- Building and managing prospect lists  

- Writing, testing, and improving outreach messaging  

- Managing follow-ups and responses  

- Booking qualified conversations with the founder  

- Tracking performance and reporting signal clearly  

- Recommending what to scale, what to stop, and what to change  



You are expected to take ownership of this function and to challenge assumptions when needed.



---



What success looks like  



Success in this role is not about vanity metrics or activity for its own sake.



It looks like:



- Clear, well-reasoned decisions about who we target and why  

- Messaging that improves based on real-world feedback  

- A growing number of relevant, qualified conversations over time  

- Honest reporting on what is working and what is not  

- Confidence that the approach can be scaled once proven  



You will be expected to show progress through clarity, learning, and outcomes, not just volume.



---



Required experience (non-negotiable)  



To be considered, you must have:



- Direct experience running B2B lead generation for services or agencies  

- Experience selling professional services, retainers, or support-style offerings  

- Proven ability to design and run outbound campaigns end-to-end  

- Strong written and verbal communication skills  

- Experience reporting performance to founders or senior leadership  



Experience in ecommerce, consumer products, or purely B2C environments is not sufficient for this role.



---



Working style  



- Full-time, remote  

- High autonomy and clear ownership  

- Direct communication with the founder and Ops Lead  

- Honest reporting expected, even when results are uncomfortable  



---



How to apply  



Use the following link:

title: Web Designer (Wordpress / Elementor / Wix) - Paid Trail + Ongoing Work
description:
We are looking for a Web Designer with strong English skills for project-based contractor work.



This role is focused primarily on WordPress/Elementor, with Wix used when appropriate for the project or based on client preference. Most work will involve landing pages, homepage/service page improvements, mobile optimization, layout cleanup, and simple visual updates that improve trust and conversion.



What you’ll do:

- design and build pages/sections primarily in WordPress/Elementor

- use Wix when a project specifically calls for it

- improve layout, spacing, and visual hierarchy

- make sites look cleaner and more professional on desktop and mobile

- update banners, buttons, images, and page structure

- follow clear direction and deliver revisions quickly



Requirements:

- experience with WordPress, Elementor, and Wix

- strongest preference for WordPress/Elementor

- strong eye for layout, spacing, and modern design

- ability to make clean mobile-friendly pages

- basic CSS understanding preferred

- good English communication

- responsive and reliable

- portfolio required



Bonus:

- graphic design ability using Photoshop and/or Illustrator

- ability to create logos, simple banners, web graphics, or brand visuals



How to apply:

Please send:

1. portfolio link

2. 3 best website examples only

3. which tools you use (WordPress, Elementor, Wix, Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.)

4. your typical availability

5. a short intro message or video (video preferred)



Important:

Start your application with the word Blue so I know you read the full post.



Paid trial first. Ongoing contractor work available, with potential to grow into a part-time or full-time role for the right candidate.

title: VIDEO EDITOR DTC Brand Facebook Ads
description:
We are a fast-growing DTC eCommerce brand. We need an experienced video editor that wants to become part of a fast growing brand with big salary potential. 



This is not a content creation role. This is a performance role. You are editing ads that need to convert.



What You Will Be Doing:



— Short-form video ads (15–60 seconds) for
 and Instagram

— Voiceover ads and AI voiceover ads

— Multiple creative variations per concept (different hooks, angles, styles)

— UGC-style ad repurposing from raw footage

— Adding captions, sound design, pacing, and hooks that stop the scroll

— Continuously improving based on ad performance data



What We Are Looking For:



— Minimum 2 years editing video ads for DTC or eCommerce brands (supplement brand experience is a strong plus — those ads are hard and we know it)

— You understand the first 3 seconds are everything

— Strong grasp of hooks, retention, and conversion psychology

— Experience with CapCut or similar editing tools

— AI tool proficiency: Higgsfield, VEO, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or similar

— Ability to generate or enhance creatives using AI (voiceovers, avatars, video generation)

— Experience with copywriting is a strong advantage

— Fast turnaround and able to handle volume without dropping quality

— Comfortable using AI tools like Claude to improve your workflow



How It Works:



We start with a paid trial task. If your work is strong, this becomes a long-term role with consistent weekly volume.



Every time one of your edits becomes a winning ad, you earn a $20–$50 bonus on top of your monthly rate. Good editors who understand performance will earn more here than anywhere else at this level.



To Apply:



Send us your portfolio or 2–3 examples of video ads you have edited for eCommerce brands. Tell us which AI tools you currently use in your workflow.



No portfolio, no reply.
